segments.text: Yeah, you can see that parry just now didn't really convert to a counter
segments.original_text: そうですね今のジャスガがとても反撃しとれなかったからも分かるように

segments.text: At this timing, the reach disadvantage is just...
segments.original_text: このタイミングにおいてどうしてもリーチさがね
永遠につきまとい続けてるから

segments.text: When reach gets priority, it's all buttons
segments.original_text: リーチさが先行されるとボタン
いやジャンプを鋭く読み切って

full_text: Yeah, you can see that parry just now didn't really convert to a counter At this timing, the reach disadvantage is just... ...it keeps haunting them Yeah When reach gets priority, it's all buttons Sharp read on that jump

corrections.rule: smash term (ジャストガード→ジャスガ)
